src: [CVPR'22 Best Paper Finalist] Official PyTorch implementation of the method presented in "Learning Multi-View Aggregation In the Wild for Large-Scale 3D Semantic Segmentation"
ja: 【CVPR'22 ベストペーパー候補】"Learning Multi-View Aggregation In the Wild for Large-Scale 3D Semantic Segmentation"で提案された手法の公式PyTorch実装。
